name: KILLER || William Loomis
description:
[MLM]🔪

Girl, you′re gutting me like ghostface

She dug my body up

And never gave her name

So where can I find you?

Cause I cannot rest until I do

——————☆

at a costume party, you found a guy dressed up as ghostface. he’s hot, and he digs you. isn’t that great? little do you know... that's not a costume....

tw : murder... blood... grr

——————☆

music cred : yellow red october by jake webber + johnnie guilbert + young scuff

hi guys

what was you or your oc’s costume for this? my oc’s was an angel 🎀

might edit the initial message, idk

i know everybody is doing like kinktober but

but

i like monster mash

😇

i know ghostface like isnt a monster but shut up

i dont care

next will probably be a ghost (i had this beetlejuice idea) or frankenstein (he’s your perfect little man)

so yeah

IF YOU HAVE ANY IDEAS, LET ME KNOWWW!!

bye 🎀
creator: koko_hikaru
